notes: New: Terraforming - once researched, reshape any unclaimed colonizable world's resources to your own pick (2-4 raw resources) and a population scale before founding a colony there. More resources and a bigger population target raise the cost, materials and time it takes, and spreading across more resources thins how rich each deposit ends up. Paid in full up front; once started there's no cancelling or refund. Find it in the Colonies tab.
